summary: Completed comprehensive testing of real spending calculation feature from ledger data. Both backend APIs and frontend components are working correctly, displaying real transaction data instead of hardcoded values.

minor_issues.impact: Notifications feature not working, but unrelated to spending insights

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/v1/insights/monthly-spending returns real ledger data (€347.00)
Backend: GET /api/v1/insights/spending?days=30 returns correct category breakdown
Backend: Response structure includes total, categories, transaction_count, period
Backend: Categories correctly mapped (WITHDRAW→WITHDRAWALS, TRANSFER→TRANSFERS, FEE→FEES)
Frontend: Dashboard 'THIS MONTH' section displays real spending (€347.00)
Frontend: Dashboard shows category breakdown (WITHDRAWALS, TRANSFERS, FEES)
Frontend: 'View full breakdown' link navigates to insights page
Frontend: Spending Insights page displays pie chart with recharts
Frontend: Insights page shows correct total and category breakdown
Frontend: Time period dropdown works (7, 30, 90 days)
Frontend: Handles zero spending case with appropriate message
Integration: Frontend correctly fetches from backend APIs
Integration: Data flows properly from ledger → backend → frontend

success_percentage.backend: 92% (23/25 tests passed, 2 failures unrelated to spending insights)
